The company operates in the government contracting domain, serving contractors and businesses that pursue federal and public sector contracts.

name: GovEagle
summary: GovEagle builds a generative AI platform that helps government contractors prepare and win federal bids and proposals by automating compliance checks, generating proposal drafts, managing knowledge repositories, and performing solution solutioning across requirements. The company operates in the government contracting space, serving public sector teams and federal contractors competing for government awards.

name: Gradia Health
summary: Gradia Health builds software and services that enable healthcare providers to deliver integrated, concierge-style care to their patient populations at scale. The company operates in the healthcare technology and care delivery domain, focusing on helping providers improve patient outcomes while optimizing their financial performance.

name: Great Question

name: Green Canopy NODE

They focus on accelerating home construction through off-site manufacturing and prefabrication while delivering all-electric, net-zero energy homes.

name: Greenboard
summary: Greenboard builds an AI-native compliance software platform that helps financial institutions manage SEC and FINRA regulatory requirements across communications, employee conduct, marketing, and firm operations. The company serves financial advisors, broker-dealers, hedge funds, private funds, and RIAs, enabling them to consolidate their entire compliance program into a single unified system.

name: Gridware
summary: Gridware builds a platform called Active Grid Response that provides real-time visibility into electrical, physical, and environmental conditions across power grids by deploying sensors at utility poles to detect hazards like fallen limbs and damaged power lines. The company operates in the electric utility and grid infrastructure domain, helping utilities prevent outages and improve public safety by eliminating the "Hazard Awareness Delay" that typically occurs when utilities only discover grid hazards after they cause failures.

name: Groww
summary: Groww is an Indian financial technology platform that provides retail investors with tools to invest in stocks, mutual funds, ETFs, and fixed income securities through a mobile-first interface. The company operates in the wealth management and investment technology domain, serving individual investors seeking to build and manage their investment portfolios.

name: Hamming AI
summary: Hamming AI develops AI-powered code review and software quality tools that analyze pull requests and codebases to identify bugs, security vulnerabilities, and performance issues before they reach production.

name: Happl
summary: Happl builds a global employee benefits platform that enables companies to manage core benefits, flexible allowances, insurance policies, and employee gifting across multiple countries while automating compliance and administrative tasks. The platform serves HR and Finance teams seeking to streamline benefits enrollment, gain insights into employee benefits usage, and reduce manual administrative work for organizations operating internationally.

name: HappyRobot
summary: HappyRobot builds an AI agent platform that deploys autonomous AI workers to handle end-to-end tasks across enterprise business functions like customer support, sales, finance, operations, and logistics. The company operates in the enterprise software space, focusing on complex operational environments where AI agents can be evaluated, trained on real-time data, and coordinated alongside human teams.

name: Harper

The company operates in the commercial insurance brokerage and placement domain, using technology and market access to match businesses with appropriate coverage.

name: Healthtech 1
summary: Healthtech 1 builds software that automates administrative tasks for GP practices in England, specifically handling patient registrations and lab test filing. The company operates in the primary care technology sector and is used by approximately 25% of England's GP practices.

name: Heart Aerospace

name: HitPay

The company operates in the fintech and payments processing industry, serving merchants who need to process transactions across e-commerce, retail, and service-based businesses.

name: Hive
summary: Hive builds project management and collaboration software that helps teams organize work, track progress, and communicate across tasks and projects. name: Inkeep
summary: Inkeep builds AI-powered customer support chatbots and search solutions that integrate with company documentation and knowledge bases to answer customer questions automatically. summary: Inscribe builds AI-powered document fraud detection software that helps banks, credit unions, and lenders identify fraudulent and deepfake documents during the lending and account opening process. summary: Sleeper is a fantasy sports platform that allows users to create and manage fantasy leagues for sports like NFL football, NBA basketball, and college football with a focus on social features and community engagement. The platform combines league management tools with messaging and betting capabilities to create a comprehensive fantasy sports experience.

name: Smartcat
summary: Smartcat is a cloud-based translation management platform that enables enterprises to manage multilingual content workflows by connecting internal teams, freelance translators, and machine translation services. The platform streamlines the translation process through project management tools, quality assurance features, and integration capabilities for businesses operating across multiple languages and markets.

name: SmarterHQ
summary: SmarterHQ builds customer data and personalization software for retailers and consumer brands, enabling companies to unify customer information across channels and deliver individualized marketing experiences. The platform helps merchants target customers with personalized offers, email campaigns, and shopping experiences based on behavioral data and purchase history.

name: Smartrr
summary: Smartrr provides a subscription and recurring revenue management platform for e-commerce brands, enabling them to create and operate subscription services directly on their Shopify stores. The platform handles billing, customer management, retention analytics, and dunning management to help merchants build predictable recurring revenue streams.

name: Smartwaiver
summary: Smartwaiver provides digital waiver and liability release management software for businesses that need participants to sign waivers before engaging in activities or using services. The platform allows companies to create, distribute, and collect electronic waivers on mobile devices and web browsers, storing signed documents securely and managing participant data across various industries including fitness, recreation, adventure sports, and healthcare.

name: Smith & Nephew
summary: Smith & Nephew is a global medical devices company that manufactures and sells orthopedic reconstruction products, advanced wound management solutions, sports medicine devices, and trauma care equipment. The company serves hospitals, surgical centers, and healthcare systems across multiple countries in the medical device and healthcare services sector.

name: Softheon
summary: Softheon builds cloud-based software platforms for health insurance administration, enrollment, and benefits management, serving government agencies, health plans, and healthcare organizations managing individual and family health insurance programs.

name: Sojern
summary: Sojern is a marketing platform that helps travel companies like hotels, airlines, and tour operators acquire customers through targeted advertising across search, display, and social channels. The company uses travel-specific data and machine learning to identify and reach travelers at key moments in their booking journey.

name: Songtrust
summary: Songtrust is a digital music publishing administration platform that helps songwriters and music publishers register, manage, and monetize their musical compositions across global streaming services and collection societies. The company handles royalty collection, rights management, and ensures songwriters receive payments from various revenue streams including mechanical royalties, performance royalties, and sync licensing.

name: SonoSim Inc.
summary: SonoSim Inc. develops ultrasound simulation and training software for medical education, allowing healthcare professionals and students to practice ultrasound techniques in a virtual environment before performing procedures on patients. Their platform features realistic anatomical models and hands-on training modules across various ultrasound specialties including emergency medicine, critical care, and obstetrics.

name: Sophos
summary: Sophos develops cybersecurity software and services for businesses and consumers, offering endpoint protection, network security, encryption, and managed detection and response capabilities across on-premises and cloud environments.

name: Sourcemap
summary: Sourcemap provides supply chain transparency software that helps companies map, visualize, and manage their sourcing networks from raw materials through manufacturing to distribution. The platform enables businesses to track product origins, identify risks, ensure compliance, and improve sustainability across global supply chains.

name: SourceScrub
summary: SourceScrub provides data quality and governance solutions that help organizations identify and remediate data issues in their source systems, particularly focusing on data lineage, quality metrics, and compliance management across enterprise data environments.

name: Sparrow Inc.
summary: Sparrow provides software that manages employee leave administration for companies, automating compliance, payroll calculations, and filing requirements. The platform helps HR teams handle leave requests, track leave balances, calculate leave pay, and file required notices while reducing administrative burden and ensuring regulatory compliance.

name: Spekit
summary: Spekit builds a browser-based guidance platform that delivers contextual help and training content directly within the tools and applications employees use daily, reducing the need to leave their workflow to find answers or learn new processes.

name: Sperasoft
summary: Sperasoft is a video game development studio that creates games across multiple platforms and genres, including mobile, PC, and console titles. The company also provides game development services and outsourcing solutions to other studios and publishers.

name: Spotter
summary: Spotter builds a field service management platform that helps construction and trades companies schedule jobs, manage crews, track equipment, and coordinate work across multiple job sites.

name: StarRez
summary: StarRez provides cloud-based software for college and university housing management, covering resident services, room assignment, billing, and occupancy tracking for higher education institutions.

name: StartEngine
summary: StartEngine is an equity crowdfunding platform that enables startups and small businesses to raise capital by offering securities to individual investors. The company operates in the financial technology and alternative finance space, facilitating direct connections between entrepreneurs seeking funding and retail investors looking to participate in early-stage companies.

name: Statista
summary: Statista operates a platform that aggregates, visualizes, and distributes market research data, statistics, and consumer insights across hundreds of industries and topics. The company serves business professionals, researchers, and organizations who need access to verified data sources, charts, and infographics for competitive analysis, market research, and strategic decision-making.

name: Stord
summary: Stord provides a logistics and fulfillment platform that connects e-commerce merchants with a network of warehouses and last-mile delivery providers to manage inventory storage, order fulfillment, and shipping. The platform operates in the third-party logistics (3PL) space, enabling businesses to outsource their warehouse and delivery operations through a unified software interface.

name: Storm8
summary: Storm8 develops mobile games and social gaming platforms, operating primarily in the casual gaming space with titles focused on simulation, strategy, and social multiplayer experiences.

name: Strata Identity
summary: Strata Identity builds a cloud-based identity platform that enables organizations to manage customer identities, access control, and authentication across multiple applications and services. The company serves enterprises and mid-market businesses that need to streamline identity management, reduce fraud risk, and improve user experience across their digital properties.

name: Streamlabs
summary: Streamlabs provides software and services for content creators to manage, monetize, and grow their streaming channels across platforms like Twitch, YouTube, and Facebook Live. Their platform includes tools for alerts, overlays, chatbots, and analytics that help streamers engage audiences and track performance metrics.

name: Striim
summary: Striim builds a real-time data integration and streaming platform that enables organizations to capture, process, and deliver data from various sources to cloud and on-premises destinations with minimal latency. The platform specializes in continuous data replication, change data capture, and event streaming across databases, applications, and data warehouses.

name: Striveworks
summary: Striveworks builds machine learning software and services that help organizations operationalize AI models in production environments. The company focuses on enabling enterprises to deploy, monitor, and manage machine learning systems reliably across their operations.

name: StudyPoint
summary: StudyPoint provides personalized tutoring services and academic support, connecting students with qualified tutors for one-on-one instruction across K-12 and college-level subjects.

name: StyleSeat
summary: StyleSeat is a booking and business management platform for beauty and wellness professionals, including hairstylists, estheticians, massage therapists, and other service providers. The platform enables these professionals to manage appointments, build client relationships, accept payments, and grow their independent practices through online booking and marketing tools.

name: SuperAnnotate
summary: SuperAnnotate provides a data annotation platform that enables enterprises to label and prepare training data for machine learning models, with features for image, video, document, and audio annotation across computer vision, natural language processing, and other AI use cases.

name: super{set}
summary: Superset is a data visualization and business intelligence platform that enables users to explore, visualize, and share data insights through interactive dashboards and charts. The company operates in the data analytics and visualization space, serving organizations that need to transform raw data into actionable business intelligence.

name: Surfshark
summary: Surfshark is a VPN service provider that offers encrypted internet connections and privacy protection for users across multiple devices and platforms. The company operates in the cybersecurity and digital privacy sector, providing tools to mask IP addresses, encrypt traffic, and access geo-restricted content.

name: Sustainment
summary: Sustainment builds software and services for corporate sustainability reporting and environmental compliance, helping companies track, manage, and disclose their ESG (environmental, social, and governance) metrics to stakeholders and regulatory bodies.

name: SwagUp
summary: SwagUp is a platform that helps companies manage and distribute branded merchandise and promotional gifts to employees and customers. The service handles everything from product selection and customization to inventory management and fulfillment of corporate swag orders.

name: Swiftly
summary: Swiftly provides a mobile platform that enables field workers in retail, grocery, and other consumer-facing businesses to access real-time inventory data, execute tasks, and capture information directly from store shelves. The company's software helps retailers optimize shelf management, reduce out-of-stocks, and improve operational efficiency through mobile-first tools designed for frontline workers.

name: Switchfly
summary: Switchfly provides a technology platform that enables airlines, hotels, and other travel companies to create and manage loyalty program partnerships and ancillary revenue opportunities through dynamic inventory exchange and monetization tools.

name: Syniverse
summary: Syniverse provides secure, scalable solutions for mobile operators and businesses worldwide.

name: T-Mobile
summary: T-Mobile is a wireless telecommunications company that provides network coverage, service plans, and mobile technology solutions to customers through retail locations and multiple channels.

name: Talkiatry

name: Talkspace
summary: Talkspace is a teletherapy platform that connects users with licensed therapists for online therapy sessions via messaging, video, and phone calls. The company operates in the mental health and behavioral wellness space, providing accessible mental health treatment to individuals seeking therapy from home.

name: Tamr
summary: Tamr builds enterprise data mastering and data quality software that helps organizations unify, cleanse, and govern data across their systems. The platform uses machine learning to automatically match, merge, and standardize data from multiple sources, enabling companies to create a single trusted view of their data assets.

name: Tapcart
summary: Tapcart builds a mobile commerce platform that enables direct-to-consumer brands to create native iOS and Android apps without coding, allowing them to sell products, manage inventory, and engage customers through mobile storefronts. The company operates in the e-commerce and mobile app development space, serving primarily Shopify merchants and other online retailers.

name: Tapcheck
summary: Tapcheck provides earned wage access and financial wellness services for employees, allowing workers to access a portion of their earned wages before their regular payday through a mobile app.

name: Tapestry - Coach, Kate Spade, and Stuart Weitzman
summary: Tapestry is a luxury fashion holding company that owns and operates three premium brands: Coach, Kate Spade, and Stuart Weitzman, which design and sell handbags, apparel, footwear, and accessories through retail stores, department stores, and e-commerce channels globally.

name: Taskrabbit
summary: TaskRabbit is a marketplace platform that connects users with independent contractors to complete various household and moving tasks. The company operates in the on-demand services space, allowing customers to hire Taskers for jobs ranging from furniture assembly and handyman work to cleaning and delivery services.

name: Tatari
summary: Tatari provides a software platform that helps brands measure and optimize their TV advertising performance, offering analytics and attribution tools specifically designed for connected TV and traditional broadcast campaigns.

name: TaxBit
summary: TaxBit provides cryptocurrency tax reporting and compliance software that helps individuals and businesses calculate capital gains, track transactions across multiple exchanges and wallets, and generate tax documents for filing with the IRS.

name: TeamSnap
summary: TeamSnap builds cloud-based software for managing youth and amateur sports teams, offering tools for scheduling, communication, roster management, and payment processing. The platform serves coaches, team administrators, and parents across various sports leagues and recreational organizations.

summary: Teragonia develops climate-focused financial software and carbon accounting platforms that help organizations measure, manage, and report their greenhouse gas emissions and sustainability metrics.

name: Terapify

The service operates in the digital mental health space, offering therapy appointments, psychiatric consultations, and mental wellness support accessible through video, phone, and messaging.

name: TerraClear
summary: TerraClear develops autonomous robots and software that remove rocks and debris from agricultural land to improve soil quality and crop yield. The company operates in the agtech sector, providing equipment and services that help farmers prepare and maintain their fields more efficiently.

name: TestBox
summary: TestBox provides AI-powered demo automation software that helps sales and go-to-market teams conduct product demonstrations using realistic data and pre-configured environments. The platform includes demo environments, sandbox management, data generation, and AI-assisted playbooks designed to reduce demo friction and improve deal outcomes.

name: Testlio
summary: Testlio provides cloud-based software testing and quality assurance services, connecting businesses with a global network of professional testers to validate applications across devices, browsers, and operating systems.

name: TextPower, Inc.

name: The Larvol Group
summary: Larvol provides data intelligence and analytics tools for pharmaceutical and biotech companies focused on oncology, aggregating information from over 100,000 cancer clinical trials, KOL social media conversations, and outcomes data through an AI-powered platform. The company operates in the life sciences software and data analytics space, offering tools to help drug developers and researchers access, search, and analyze cancer trial results and biomarker information.

name: Thinkful
summary: Thinkful is an online coding bootcamp and skills training platform that offers immersive programs in software engineering, data analytics, UX/UI design, and product management. summary: ThirdChannel provides software and services that help retailers and consumer goods companies manage their field sales teams, including mobile apps, analytics, and training tools for in-store execution and compliance.

name: ThreatX

name: ThriveCart

name: Thumbtack

name: Tillo

name: TransPerfect

name: Twingate

name: Ubiquity6

name: Unanet

name: Unbounce
summary: Unbounce is a landing page builder and conversion optimization platform that enables marketers and agencies to create, test, and deploy high-converting landing pages without coding. The platform provides drag-and-drop page building, A/B testing tools, and AI-powered optimization features to help businesses improve their digital marketing performance.

name: Undertone by Perion

name: Union.ai

The platform integrates with existing ML infrastructure and tools to streamline the development and orchestration of complex data and ML workflows.

name: UnitedMasters

The company provides tools for music promotion, analytics, and direct-to-fan capabilities, operating in the independent music and digital distribution space.

name: Unmind

The company delivers evidence-based mental health interventions through an app and web interface, serving corporate clients seeking to improve employee mental health outcomes and reduce workplace stress.

name: Unqork

The platform serves large enterprises across financial services, insurance, healthcare, and government sectors to accelerate digital transformation and reduce development time for mission-critical applications.
